_definition.ISO_639_3_eng: Namespace for International Olympic Committee country codes used to identify nations and territories in Olympic competition.

_description.ISO_639_3_eng: The International Olympic Committee assigns three-letter codes to each National Olympic Committee. These codes are used in all Olympic broadcasts, results, and medal tables. IOC codes broadly follow ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 but differ in a number of cases — for example, Germany is `GER` in IOC but `DEU` in ISO 3166-1.
